title: CrashLoopBackOff — Pod Crash Loop Recovery
summary: A pod is repeatedly crashing and restarting. Kubernetes marks it CrashLoopBackOff after several failed starts.
likely_causes: Bad configuration (missing env var, wrong secret key)
Application startup failure (bad image, missing dependency)

action_params.note: Restart only if root cause is transient (startup race). If config error, fix config first.
